description: User dwells on the Home Loans landing page, likely reviewing the available options.
User navigates to the 'Home loan calculators and tools' page by clicking on the corresponding icon.
User scrolls down the calculators page to locate the refinance calculator.
User pauses to examine the pre-filled inputs in the refinance calculator section.
User opens the 'Loan term left' dropdown and changes the value from 20 to 25 years.
A 'Need help?' chat modal automatically appears over the content and is then minimized to a side tab.
frame_description: A green pop-up modal appears in frame 14 and is replaced by a 'Chat now' tab on the right edge in frame 15.

description: User scrolls down to view the updated savings calculations and loan features.
User navigates away from the site to a Google search results page for 'st george home loan'.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the calculator results to a search engine results page.
